description_long: This object is a hollowed-out pumpkin with a rough, orange exterior and a visible brown stem on top. The pumpkin has been carved with jagged, irregular eye holes and a large, uneven mouth, giving it a menacing jack-o'-lantern appearance. Two red cylindrical sticks resembling sticks of dynamite, complete with black fuses, are inserted into the pumpkin, one through the top and another through the side. The interior of the pumpkin is empty, exposing the rough, fibrous inner walls. The surface of the pumpkin is matte and slightly textured, with visible bumps and natural imperfections. The overall look is that of a Halloween decoration with a dramatic, explosive twist.
description: A hollow, carved jack-o'-lantern pumpkin with a brown stem and two red dynamite-like sticks inserted, featuring jagged facial cutouts and a rough, matte surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carved face with jagged eyes and mouth, and two red dynamite sticks inserted into the pumpkin.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large mouth opening and the protruding dynamite stick, with the stem visible on top.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the uncarved, rounded back of the pumpkin and the brown stem, with dynamite sticks partially visible.
description_view_3: Angled view from the back, focusing on the stem and the two dynamite sticks emerging from the pumpkin's side and top.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jack-o'-lantern style with jagged, irregular cutouts for eyes and a large, uneven mouth. The carving is rough and expressive, with no additional motifs or etchings.
